description: grep on empty files exits 1 under pipefail, causing script abort. Fix: check -s before grep, add || true

pattern: eval() for dynamic filtering is an anti-pattern
description: Never use eval to build filter commands from user input. Use jq --arg for safe JSON filtering or awk -v for safe text processing.
test functions that return 1 on failure abort the entire suite under set -e. Test runners need || true on individual test calls or set +e in the runner.
New features that add cost/complexity should be disabled by default with opt-in config. Prevents surprise behavior changes for existing users.

Local models with 4K-32K context windows need sliding-window message pruning. Keep first user message (intent) + last N turns. Reserve 40 tokens for summary injection. System prompt compression strips code blocks, examples, tables before hard truncating.
When using AbortController with setTimeout for fetch timeouts, always clearTimeout() in both try and catch blocks. Missing cleanup in catch causes timer accumulation on repeated network failures.

pattern: Default to complex for unknown tasks
description: In task classification for cost routing, default to 'complex' (cloud) when no keywords match. Local models may struggle with ambiguous tasks. Safety-first routing prevents poor output quality.
